title: Proclamation No. 567, s. 1940
text:
MALACAÑAN PALACE MANILA

PROCLAMATION NO. 567

RESERVING FOR PLAZA PURPOSES FOUR (4) PARCELS OF THE PUBLIC DOMAIN SITUATED IN THE POBLACION, MUNICIPALITY OF DAO, PROVINCE OF CAPIZ, ISLAND OF PANAY.

Upon the recommendation of the Secretary of Agriculture and Commerce and pursuant to the provisions of section eighty-three of Commonwealth Act Numbered One hundred and forty-one, as amended, I hereby withdraw from sale or settlement and reserve for plaza purposes, under the administration of the municipality of Dao, subject to private rights, if any there be, the following parcels of the public domain, situated in the Poblacion, municipality of Dao, Province of Capiz, island of Panay, and particularly described in Bureau of Lands plan Swo-15681, to wit:

Lot No. 1. —Beginning at a point marked 1 on Bureau of Lands plan Swo-15681, which is identical with B. L. L. M. No. 1, Dao Cad. No. 147, thence N. 27 ° 02′ E. 31.41 m. to point 2; S. 72 ° 46′ E. 63.69 m. to point 3; S. 21 ° 52′ W. 39.73m. to point 4; N. 65° 17′ W. 66.39 m. to point 1, point of beginning.

Containing an area of 2,303 square meters.

Point 2, old monument; and the rest are B. L. concrete monuments.

Bounded on the northeast by lot No. 2; on the southeast, by Andres Bonifacio Street; on the southwest, by P. Burgos Street; and on the northwest, by McKinley Street.

Lot No. 2. — Beginning at a point marked 1 on Bureau of Lands plan Swo-15681, N. 27 ° 02′ E. 31.41 m. from B. L. L. M. No. 1, Dao Cad. No. 147, thence N. 27 ° 06’ E. 32.40 m. to point 2; S. 71° 25’ E. 60.71 m. to point 3; S. 22° 00’W. 36.61 m. to point 4; N. 72° 46’ W. 63.69 m. to point 1, point of beginning.

Containing an area of 1, 944 square meters.

Point 1, old monument; and the rest are B. L. concrete monuments.

Bounded on the northeast by lot No. 3; on the southeast to Andres Bonifacio Steet; on the southwest, by lot No. 1; and on the northwest by McKinley Street.

Lot No. 2.- Beginning at a point marked 1 on Bureau of Lands plan Swo-15681, N. 27° 04’ E. 63.81 m., more or less, from B. L. L. M. No. 1 Dao Cad. No. 147, thence N. 27° 06’ E. 64.68 m. to point 2; S. 64° 09’E. 54.94 m. to point 3; S. 21° 58’ W. 57.12 m. to point 4; N. 71° 25’ W. 60.71 m. to point 1, point of beginning.

Containing an area of 3,507 square meters.

All corners are B. L. concrete monuments.

Bounded on the northeast, by General Luna Street; on the southeast, by Andres Bonifacio Street; on the southwest, by lot No. 2; and on the northwest, by McKinley Street.

Lot No. 210 .-Beginning at a point marked 1 on Bureau of Lands plan Swo-15681, N. 27° 04’ E. 186.63 m., more or less, from B. L. L. M. No. 1. Dao Cad No. 147, thence S. 63° 16’ E. 51.41 m. to point 2; S. 23° 30’ W. 47.36 m. to point 3; N. 64° 10’ W. 54.36 m., to point 4; N. 27° 94’ E. 48.14 m. to point 1, point of beginning.

Containing an area of 2,524 square meters.

All corners are B. L. concrete monuments.

Bounded on the northeast by San Roque street; on the southeast, by Andres Bonifacio Street; on the southwest, by General Luna Street; on the northwest, by McKinley Street.

Bearings true. Declination 1° 15’ E.

Points referred to are marked on Bureau of Lands plan Swo-15681.

Surveyed: October, 1918-March 1921.

Approved: January 27, 1940.

In witness whereof, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Commonwealth of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done at the City of Manila, this twenty-second day of June, in the year of Our Lord, nineteen hundred and forty, and of the Commonwealth of the Philippines, the fifth.

MANUEL L. QUEZON President of the Philippines

By the President: JORGE B. VARGAS Secretary to the President

Source: Presidential Museum and Library
